skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5-120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips.
skill.summary: AI agent that creates short videos from text descriptions using the Pexo API.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate API client for the Pexo AI video creation service. All static findings are consistent with expected CLI tool behavior: shell scripts use command substitution for API calls, env vars store API credentials, and config files live in ~/.pexo/. No malicious intent, data exfiltration, or prompt injection detected. The script code is transparent and well-documented.

low_findings.title: API key stored in environment variables
low_findings.description: The skill reads PEXO_API_KEY from environment variables or config file for API authentication. This is standard for API client tools and is not evidence of credential harvesting. The key is only sent to pexo.ai API endpoints in Authorization headers.

low_findings.title: Shell command substitution in scripts
low_findings.description: The bash scripts use $() command substitution extensively for variable capture and process execution. This is standard bash scripting practice for CLI tools. All commands (curl, jq, mktemp, cat, rm) are necessary for API client functionality.

low_findings.title: Network requests to external API
low_findings.description: The skill makes HTTPS requests to pexo.ai for project management and video creation. Network access is required for the service to function. All requests go to a single legitimate domain and use proper authentication.

low_findings.title: Hidden file access in home directory
low_findings.description: The skill reads configuration from ~/.pexo/config and creates temp files in ~/.pexo/tmp/. This is standard for CLI tools storing user configuration. The file paths are well-documented and transparent.

content.user_title: Create short AI videos with Pexo
content.value_statement: Creating short marketing and social media videos requires time, skill, and expensive tools. Pexo Agent lets you describe any video in plain language and delivers a finished product with professional script, visuals, and music.
actual_capabilities: Creates short videos (5-120 seconds) from plain text descriptions
Uploads images, videos, and audio files as reference media for the AI
Polls for production status and delivers final video download links
Supports multiple aspect ratios (16:9 horizontal, 9:16 vertical, 1:1 square)
Handles project creation, preview selection, and video revision workflow
Diagnoses configuration and connectivity issues with built-in doctor script
limitations: Video production takes 15-20 minutes, not instant
Cannot control specific visual details like camera angles or color grading
Requires a Pexo API key and active credits to use
Only produces videos up to 120 seconds in length

use_cases.title: Product marketing videos
use_cases.description: Describe your product in a few sentences and get a promotional video ready for social media and ads.

use_cases.title: Social media content
use_cases.description: Create TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts by describing the concept in plain language.

use_cases.title: Brand explainer videos
use_cases.description: Turn a brief description of your brand or service into a short explainer video with professional pacing.

prompt_templates.title: Basic video creation
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a short video about [your topic or idea].
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when the user wants a simple video with no specific requirements

prompt_templates.title: Video with reference media
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a video for my [product or brand]. Here are some reference images: [upload files]. The video should highlight the design and features.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when the user has images or videos to include as reference

prompt_templates.title: Video revision request
prompt_templates.prompt: Update the video for project [project_id]. The user wants: [specific change like different music, faster pacing, or new text].
prompt_templates.scenario: Use when the user wants to revise an existing video in progress

prompt_templates.title: Full workflow with preview selection
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a project: pexo-project-create.sh "A 30-second ad for my coffee shop". Then upload the product photos and send: pexo-chat.sh [project_id] "Create an ad showing our signature latte and cozy interior." Show preview options to the user and deliver the final video.
prompt_templates.scenario: Use for end-to-end video production with preview choices

output_examples.input: Make a 15-second product video showing my handmade ceramic mugs. Here are photos: [uploads 3 images].
output_examples.output: Project created. Uploading reference images... Request submitted to Pexo. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes. Here is the project page: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_abc123. After production: Here is your video download link and the project page for revisions.

output_examples.input: Create an Instagram Reel about our new bakery. We want it to feel warm and inviting.
output_examples.output: Preview options ready: Option A, Option B, Option C. Please select your preferred version. After selection: Video is ready. Download link: [full signed URL with all query parameters]. Project page: https://pexo.ai/project/proj_def456. Are you satisfied or would you like revisions?

best_practices: Let Pexo handle all creative decisions about visuals, pacing, and music. Adding your own creative details overrides the AI's professional judgment.
Wait at least 60 seconds between status checks during production. Polling too fast does not speed up video creation.
Send all user information in a single message to the Pexo API to minimize token costs and avoid duplicate production.
anti_patterns: Do not add your own descriptions of visual style or pacing. Pexo has professional video production expertise built in.
Do not call pexo-chat.sh while the status is WAIT. This triggers duplicate video production and wastes credits.
Do not truncate download URLs. The full URL including query parameters (OSSAccessKeyId, Expires, Signature) is required to access the video.

faq.question: What do I need to use this skill?
faq.answer: A Pexo API key, curl, jq, and the file command installed on your system. Run pexo-doctor.sh to verify your setup.

faq.question: How long does it take to make a video?
faq.answer: About 15-20 minutes for a short video. Complex projects or longer videos may take more time.

faq.question: What video formats does Pexo support?
faq.answer: Output is MP4 video. Supported aspect ratios are 16:9 (horizontal), 9:16 (vertical), and 1:1 (square).

faq.question: Can I upload my own images and videos?
faq.answer: Yes. Supported uploads: Images (jpg, png, webp, bmp, tiff, heic), videos (mp4, mov, avi), and audio (mp3, wav, aac, m4a, ogg, flac).

faq.question: How much does it cost to make videos?
faq.answer: Video production consumes Pexo credits. Each message sent to Pexo costs tokens. Check your balance with pexo-entitlements.sh.

faq.question: What happens when my credits run out?
faq.answer: The script prints a credit error with a link to purchase more credits. After adding credits, retry the failed command.
